answer:
Hello, World!
Hello, Java! Hello, Java!
explanation: greet("World") calls the single-arg overload → 'Hello, World!'. greet("Java", 2): i=0 no leading space, appends 'Hello, Java!'; i=1 appends ' ' then 'Hello, Java!'. Result: 'Hello, Java! Hello, Java!'.
alternatives:
Hello, World!
Hello, Java! Hello, Java!
